RegLoan Bank — Form W-2 Wage and Tax Statement Document W2-0006 Page 1 of 1 Employee: Grace Dubois SSN: [REDACTED] Box Description Amount ($) 1 Wages, tips, other comp. 150,120 2 Federal income tax withheld 19,798 3 Social security wages 84,582 4 Social security tax withheld 2,708 5 Medicare wages and tips 138,704 6 Medicare tax withheld 2,899
